programme.title: Dia Yang Kau Pilih
programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.title: Senyummu Lebih Ampuh Dari Baso Sepuh
programme.desc: Jihan (Nabila Zavira) was cheated on by her boyfriend with her own best friend. Unfortunately, Fatih (Masaji Wijayanto) was told to be his girlfriend as his pretend best friend Jihan.

programme.title: Hati Ini Terasa Nanas Kalau Kamu Bukan Jodohku
programme.desc: Ruben, a rich kid who feels constrained in his life, refuses to be matched to Cindy by his father, Joseph. The conflict grows as Ruben becomes involved with Ratih and together confronts problems in the pineapple orchard, creating positive changes in his life.

programme.title: Love Story The Series S3
programme.desc: Kendra's meeting with Maudy began with an accidental meeting at the Villa, that's where Ken first saw Maudy and immediately fell in love. Initially, Maudy was disturbed by Ken's presence, accidentally the horse that Maudy was riding went berserk until it fell into the river, not long after Ken jumped to save Maudy.

programme.title: Kuwakuwi Aku Gwenchana Tanpamu
programme.desc: Raja, a mischievous young man, got himself into trouble, prompting his grandmother, Omah Lisa, to seize all his assets. In this difficult situation, Raja tried to ask his brother, Farel, for help, but ended up in conflict with him. Amidst the chaos, Putri, a rolled egg seller, accidentally got involved and considered a marriage proposal to help her grandfather.

programme.desc: Love After Love tells the story of the life of a family that looks perfect but turns out to have a heartbreaking secret. Feeling lucky to have a husband like Niko, a successful businessman and a daughter Audrey, Starla now has to swallow the bitterness of Niko's affair with their schoolmate, Ayu.

programme.title: Udah Bener Jualan Bubur Malah Bikin Hatiku Melebur

programme.title: Mission: Impossible -- Ghost Protocol

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: A mettlesome tribesman must do whatever it takes to protect himself and his family from a multitude of threats during the Mayan civilisation's waning years.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II

programme.title: Annisa
programme.desc: Sebuah program kerohanian yang mengupas pelbagai topik masyarakat, kerjaya, realiti dan isu semasa terhadap wanita. Dikatakan sifat ini adalah normal bagi seorang ibu bagi mendisiplinkan anak-anak dan juga ia satu cara untuk melepaskan tekanan.

programme.title: Jejak Altruis

Usaha gigih dan semangat mereka dalam membantu masyarakat tanpa mengira latar belakang amat memberi inspirasi kepada semua masyarakat.
